/usr/lib64/ccache/c++ -fPIC -std=c++14 -O3 -march=native -fPIC  -O2 -g -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/dacestub_process_samples_dace.dir/link.d -shared -Wl,-soname,libdacestub_process_samples_dace.so -o libdacestub_process_samples_dace.so CMakeFiles/dacestub_process_samples_dace.dir/tools/dacestub.cpp.o  -ldl /usr/lib/gcc/x86_64-redhat-linux/15/libgomp.so /usr/lib64/libpthread.a
